query:
-- Campeonatos cadastrados
SELECT 'tournaments' AS tabela, COUNT(*) AS total FROM tournaments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tournaments_active', COUNT(*) FROM tournaments WHERE isAvailable = 1
UNION ALL
-- Jogos cadastrados
SELECT 'games_total', COUNT(*) FROM games
UNION ALL
SELECT 'games_with_result', COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE homeScore IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'games_scheduled_future', COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE matchDate > NOW() AND status = 'scheduled'
UNION ALL
-- Times
SELECT 'teams', COUNT(*) FROM teams
UNION ALL
-- Logs de sync
SELECT 'sync_logs_total', COUNT(*) FROM api_football_sync_logs
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sync_logs_today', COUNT(*) FROM api_football_sync_logs WHERE createdAt >= CURDATE()
UNION ALL
-- Quota de hoje
SELECT 'quota_used_today', COALESCE(SUM(requestsUsed), 0) FROM api_football_sync_logs WHERE DATE(createdAt) = CURDATE();
